summary: A small stepped pyramid-style structure with a rectangular footprint, featuring a tiered brick roof, cream/yellow sandstone walls with small windows, and a concrete foundation platform. The building sits on a raised dirt foundation surrounded by a concrete border.

shape.symmetry: bilateral symmetry along length axis; stepped roof recedes toward center

elements: small rectangular windows (4 visible on front)
rebuild_hints: Build concrete foundation platform first, approximately 10×14 blocks
Construct main walls from sandstone blocks, approximately 3-4 blocks tall
Add stonebrick corner reinforcements at wall edges
Place 4 small windows (1-2 blocks wide) evenly spaced on front wall
Build stepped brick roof in 3-4 receding layers, each layer smaller than the last
Ensure roof steps inward symmetrically from all sides
Add concrete trim band between wall and roof
Surround with dirt mound and concrete border at ground level
uncertainties: Exact window dimensions and spacing uncertain from angles shown
Precise number of roof steps (appears to be 3-4 layers)
Interior structure not visible; may be solid or hollow
Exact height of concrete foundation platform
Whether corner accents are full blocks or partial slabs
